```json

  "build": "react-scripts build",
```

ERROR in [eslint] EACCES: permission denied, mkdir '/Users/rohithvarma/Desktop/bc_phase2/reactApp/node_modules/.cache'

This error occurs due to a lack of write permissions for the `node_modules/.cache` directory in your project. To resolve this issue, you can change the directory permissions using the following command:

```bash
sudo chmod -R 777 /Users/rohithvarma/Desktop/bc_phase2/reactApp/node_modules/.cache
```

This command will grant read, write, and execute permissions to the `.cache` folder and all its contents. After running the command, you should be able to run your project without any permission errors.

Keep in mind that using `777` permissions might not be the best practice in a production environment, as it allows any user on the system to read, write or execute files in the directory. For development purposes, it should be fine, but if you deploy your application, make sure to set appropriate permissions for improved security.
